message.content:
Find all files related to the "support" or "tickets" page in this Next.js FSD project at /Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe. Look for:
1. app/**/support/ or app/**/tickets/ routes
2. src/pages-layer/support/ or src/pages-layer/tickets/
3. Any widgets related to support tickets (create-ticket-form, payment-history, etc.)
4. The authenticated layout and how new design routes work
5. The Header and Footer components used in new design routes

Return file paths and key content of the main support/tickets page files.

Perfect! Now I have a comprehensive understanding. Let me compile the final report with all the key file paths and content.

## Summary Report: Support/Tickets Pages in LuxFlow FE

I've found all files related to the "support" or "tickets" pages in the Next.js FSD project. Here's a comprehensive breakdown:

### 1. App Router Routes (Thin Wrappers)

**User Tickets Pages:**
- `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/app/(app)/(protected)/tickets/page.tsx` - List active/archived tickets with tab navigation
- `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/app/(app)/(protected)/tickets/create/page.tsx` - Create new ticket form
- `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/app/(app)/(protected)/tickets/[id]/page.tsx` - Ticket detail view

**Admin Tickets Pages:**
- `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/app/(app)/admin/tickets/page.tsx` - Admin list of all tickets
- `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/app/(app)/admin/tickets/[id]/page.tsx` - Admin ticket detail view

### 2. Widget Components (FSD Layer)

**Ticket-related Widgets:**
- `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/create-ticket-form/ui/create-ticket-form.tsx` - Form component with:
  - Guest fields (full name, email)
  - Category selection
  - Related order reference (searchable)
  - Description textarea with 2000 char limit
  - File upload (drag & drop, max 5 files, 5MB each)
  - Preferred contact methods (In-App, Email, Phone)
  - Form validation with Zod

- `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/create-ticket-form/model/types.ts` - Props interface
- `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/ticket-detail/ui/ticket-detail.tsx` - Display ticket details, status, attachments, admin comments, and cancel button
- `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/admin-ticket-detail/ui/admin-ticket-detail.tsx` - Admin view of ticket details
- `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/tickets-table/ui/tickets-table.tsx` - Table display for admin tickets

### 3. Layout Components (New Design System)

**Authenticated Layout:**
- `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/authenticated-layout/ui/authenticated-layout.tsx`
  - Routes configured for NEW_DESIGN_ROUTES: `["/wallet", "/profile", "/my-deals", "/buyback-requests/create", "/buyback-requests", "/buybacks", "/tickets"]`
  - `/tickets` uses new design layout (Header + Footer, no sidebar)
  - New design spacing: `mx-auto max-w-[1720px] px-4 py-4 min-[1172px]:px-10 min-[1172px]:py-8`

**Header Component:**
- `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/header/ui/header.tsx`
  - Logo, navigation links, About dropdown
  - Authenticated: Bell icon (notifications), user avatar with dropdown menu (Profile, Accounts & Wallets, Transaction History, Logout)
  - Unauthenticated: Login/Register links
  - Mobile responsive menu

**Footer Component:**
- `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/footer/ui/footer.tsx`
  - Contact section with social links (TikTok, Instagram, WhatsApp)
  - Address and contact information
  - Language selector
  - Footer navigation links
  - Terms & Conditions, Privacy Policy
  - Decorative footer images

### 4. Related Widgets

**Payment History Widget:**
- `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/src/widgets/payment-history/ui/payment-history.tsx` - Transaction history table with summary cards and pagination (referenced in the user's memory as modified file)

### 5. Key Design System Details (New Design Routes)

**Color Scheme:**
- Background: `#F5F3EF`
- Border: `#D6D3D1` (cards), `#A8A29E` (inputs)
- Text: `#44403C` (primary), `#A8A29E` (muted)
- Primary: `#021171` (buttons)
- Status colors: Green (#D1FAE5), Blue (#DBEAFE), Red (#FEE2E2), Gray (#F3F4F6)

**Typography:**
- `font-new-sans` - DM Sans (body text, labels, buttons)
- `font-new-serif` - Feature Display Web (headings)

**Component Styles:**
- Input: `h-12 rounded-[4px] border border-[#A8A29E] px-3 font-new-sans text-sm`
- Primary button: `bg-[#021171] text-[#F5F3EF] rounded-lg h-12 font-new-sans font-medium text-base`
- Modal: `rounded-2xl border border-[#D6D3D1] bg-[#F5F3EF] shadow-[0px_20px_28px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]`

### 6. Protected Layout Configuration

**File:** `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe/app/(app)/(protected)/layout.tsx`
- Also has `NEW_DESIGN_ROUTES` array that must match authenticated-layout.tsx
- Routes in this array bypass sidebar and render full width
- Currently includes: `"/wallet", "/buyback-requests/create", "/my-deals", "/buyback-requests", "/buybacks", "/tickets"`

### 7. Tickets Page Features

**User Tickets List** (`/tickets`):
- Tab navigation: Active | Archive
- Status colors: Open (green), Resolved (blue), Rejected (red), Cancelled (gray)
- Click to view ticket detail
- "Raise a Ticket" button links to `/tickets/create`
- Empty state with CTA to create first ticket
- Uses React Query hooks: `useTickets()`, `useAdminTickets()`

**Create Ticket**:
- Accessible to guests and authenticated users
- Category dropdown (TicketCategory enum)
- Reference order search (for Active Buyback or Buyback Request categories)
- File upload with drag-and-drop
- Preferred contact methods (checkboxes)
- Submit validation with Zod schema

All files are using the new design system with modern spacing, typography, and color schemes as defined in the project memory.
